utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage; property_coverage; travel_coverage; additional_services; total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified with costs: 1) health_coverage: explicitly lists physical and mental health insurance with individual costs and a total health cost. Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: provides home/contents insurance with a monthly cost and total property cost. Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: provides travel insurance with costs (plan and add-on) and total travel cost. Fully specified. 4) additional_services: lists enhancement services; some are included at no extra cost, but the requirement is “any enhancement services with costs.” Costs are not provided for these services (stated as included), which may be acceptable if cost is zero; however, the format explicitly asks for costs, so this is not fully specified for each service. 5) total_budget: includes monthly and annual cost breakdown, plus extras (savings, previous cost, start date). Fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified according to the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each distinct plan/add-on mentioned in the final coverage plan and match to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings. Mappings found: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) -> primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9); LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) -> primary_health_coverage.mental_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9); LifeFirst Standard Coverage (home contents) -> property_protection.home_content.LifeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 9); InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel) -> mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.InsurePlus Standard Plan (rating 10); Adventure Activities Add-on corresponds to travel_enhancement_services.Adventure Travel Coverage (rating 10).
